hero.tagline: The original body-on-frame Scorpio, kept tough and simple.

pricing.notes: Mahindra website lists Scorpio Classic range around INR 13.00L - INR 17.00L. Variant-level values should be verified with dealer/state price list before publishing.

overview.minides: Diesel torque, old-school toughness, and a road presence that still makes people move aside. Iykyk.
overview.description: The Mahindra Scorpio Classic is the older-school Scorpio line sold alongside the Scorpio-N. It uses a 2.2L mHawk diesel engine with a 6-speed manual gearbox and 2WD layout. The range is simple: Classic S and Classic S11 trims, with seating choices including 7-side-facing, 9-side-facing and 7-seat captain-chair layouts depending on trim.

suspension.front: Double Wish-bone Type, Independent Front Coil Spring
suspension.rear: Multi Link Coil Spring Suspension with Anti-roll Bar
suspension.shockAbsorbers: Hydraulic Double Acting, Telescopic Shock Absorber
